passives.name: Shaped Charge
passives.effects: Your next instance of [[ability damage]] to a champion or epic monster with a [[champion ability]] deals {{as|{{rd|30|15}} {{as|(+ {{rd|{{fd|1.5}}|{{fd|0.75}}}} per 1 lethality)}} '''bonus''' true damage}}.

passives.name: Sabotage
passives.effects: Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants you ''Sabotage'' for 90 seconds, empowering your next basic attack against a {{tip|turret}} or epic {{tip|monster}} to consume the effect to deal {{as|{{rd|300|240}} {{as|(+ {{rd|25|20}} per 1 lethality)}} '''bonus''' true damage}} over 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Next ability damage to champion/epic monster deals bonus true damage. Cooldown 45s.
Takedown within 3s grants Sabotage for 90s; next basic attack vs turret/epic monster deals bonus true damage over 3s.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Shaped Charge arms one champion-ability damage instance against a champion or epic monster, then enters a 45-second cooldown.
Execution model: Sabotage is a two-phase takedown effect; a qualifying takedown grants a 90-second buff that is consumed by the next basic attack against a turret or epic monster.
Player-visible behavior: Sabotage damage resolves as bonus true damage over 3 seconds after the consuming attack.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Bastionbreaker)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Shaped Charge melee/ranged lethality scaling, Sabotage takedown gating, buff duration, and turret/epic-monster consume branch semantics
